fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 73 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which fails to treat an entry as expired when the current time is exactly equal to the expiration time. The comparison should be greater-than-or-equal (`>=`).

constraints.intent: The result of the expiry comparison should be the same as if it correctly handled the boundary case.
If an entry is considered valid and returned, the current time must be strictly before its expiry time.
The time adjusted for clock skew should not be after the original time.
